blocks.text: In the morning I got breakfast with the bomber guy. As i said, despite the strange hobby, he is a nice guy.
I paid for this breakfast but the barman gave it to us all for free.

Then I went to a park nearby and watched Netflix on a park chair. I sat in the sun, cooked food and slept with an incredible views. I felt like I needed a rest day, but also if I waited in Ponte di Legno, a special surprise was coming...
I waited and waited for hours in the park.
Adam and Kai showed up at the park (yes we planned this)
I had beers and pastries ready for their arrival.
We sat by the river with an incredible view of the mountains. Kai and Adam went for a swim in the cold cold river while we still had sun.
We drank beers, talked about all our stories of travels.
Kai spending a month in the mountains, the Dolomites.
Adam biked through Albania, Montenegro, Kosovo, and Croatia.
There were so many crazy stories and we talk for hours. We all thought back to the beautiful luck it took to first meet Kai and Alex in Greece.
Once again we reminded ourselves of the beauty of travelling by bicycle.

We went for pizza at the same restaurant I went to do the deforme to hide from the rain, and at 10 or 11 pm we left to find a place to sleep, back at the park where I had relaxed all day. It was Slightly raining but and we easily found a camping spot in the park nearby. The trees protected us from the rain.
